system.flavor: You turn your enemies' strike to your own favor, spinning their own momentum into deadly force.
system.effect:
Effect evasion and the following interrupt:

[Viper Sting — Interrupt 1, range 1-3]
Trigger foe misses an attack
Effect [X]: Dash 3. If that puts you adjacent to your foe, they take 2 damage. If their attack roll was 5 or less, they take 2d3 damage instead. Double this damage if they are in crisis.
Overdrive +3 and dash +3
Sacrifice 4 the interrupt

(Sacrifice your limits and spend HP as part of the ability to increase its power. This is not damage and additionally cannot take you past 1 hp. You can continue to sacrifice even if it would take you lower than 1 hp.)
